actions:
CREATE OR REPLACE PROPERTY GRAPH LogisticsRoutingGraph
  NODE TABLES (
    v_network_routing KEY (node_id) AS NetworkRouting,
    v_network_routing_segment KEY (segment_id) AS RoutingSegment,
    v_operation KEY (operation_id) AS Operation
  )
  EDGE TABLES (
    v_transit_path
      KEY (origin_node_id, segment_id)
      SOURCE KEY (origin_node_id) REFERENCES v_network_routing (node_id)
      DESTINATION KEY (segment_id) REFERENCES v_network_routing_segment (segment_id)
      AS TRANSIT_PATH
  );
